channel.title: GitHub Twig Languages Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Twig Languages in GitHub

item.title: Shoshuo/Prismarr
item.description: A self-hosted media dashboard unifying Radarr, Sonarr, Prowlarr, Jellyseerr, qBittorrent and TMDb in a single Symfony 8 interface. One search bar across the local library and TMDb, one calendar merging movie and episode releases, one dashboard, one settings page. Single Docker container, embedded SQLite, multi-arch. AGPL-3.0.
